creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
(In reply to Olivier Certner from comment #21)
Hold your horses Olivier. Read my previous messages and review your wrong assumptions (i.e. "not willing to test"). There are various problems with AMDGPU / DRM / LinuxKPI that are reported by various people so I am not alone and those problems are disqualifying FreeBSD 14+ from a production use in that setup. Yes I am stuck with 13 here until a fix is made as I cannot fix it myself. When any fix shows up I can test it on a separate drive ufs install, do you have anything to test? :-)
